allow:
Bash(git -c user.name="Maknistong68" -c user.email="Maknistong68@users.noreply.github.com" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Initial commit: Lovella date-ask app

React + Vite + Tailwind single-page app with a playful runaway NO button,
heart confetti on YES, and resilient response storage \(Supabase with
localStorage backup + retry queue\). Hardened for in-app browsers
\(TikTok/Messenger/IG\) via a bounded play-area for the NO button.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -c user.name="Maknistong68" -c user.email="Maknistong68@users.noreply.github.com" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Make copy all-Tagalog, gentler, and mobile-safe

- All on-screen text now in Tagalog \("kahit minsan", "walang pressure"\)
- Replace 6-dodge chase with 2 gentle hops so the NO button stays
  visible and tappable on phones / in-app browsers
- Add soft, no-guilt second-chance flow when NO is tapped
- Kind, pressure-free ending for a real "no"
- Update page title / link-preview text to Tagalog

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -c user.name="Maknistong68" -c user.email="Maknistong68@users.noreply.github.com" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Use a single smaller photo and tighten button layout

- Replace 4-photo grid with one compact centered portrait \(public/photos/her.jpg\)
- Move Oo and Hindi closer together in a smaller play area

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -c user.name="Maknistong68" -c user.email="Maknistong68@users.noreply.github.com" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Rename photo to her.png and point the app at it

- Rename uploaded screenshot to a web-safe filename \(no spaces\)
- Update photo path and og:image to /photos/her.png

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -c user.name="Maknistong68" -c user.email="Maknistong68@users.noreply.github.com" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Turn the NO button into a full-screen chase game

- 9 dodges before it gives up \(was 2\)
- Whole-screen leaps to the opposite side each time
- Desktop proximity dodge: bolts when the cursor gets near
- Difficulty ramp: shrinks, tilts, and speeds up as the chase goes on
- Escalating Tagalog taunts + live catch counter \(n/9\)
- Pulsing Oo button to stay tempting
- Safe-zone clamping so it never hides behind mobile browser bars;
  returns home and becomes clickable once it surrenders

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -c user.name="Maknistong68" -c user.email="Maknistong68@users.noreply.github.com" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add date-planning flow after Yes

- After Oo: pick activity \(Coffee / Dinner / Late night drive\)
- Per-activity choices with a typed custom option:
  Coffee -> Dunkin''/Corniche/Starbucks, Dinner -> Almina/Time Out,
  Drive -> 30 mins/1 oras/3 oras
- Native date + time pickers \(min = today\)
- Success screen shows the full plan summary
- Store activity/place/meet_date/meet_time to Supabase \(new columns\)
  with local backup + retry; remember full detail for return visits

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -c user.name="Maknistong68" -c user.email="Maknistong68@users.noreply.github.com" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add submit step, universal back buttons, and audit trail

- New review step ending in an explicit I-submit button; nothing is
  sent until she submits
- Bumalik \(back\) on every planning step so she can never get stuck
- Audit trail on every submission: persistent device_id \(UUID in
  browser, no sign-in\) + fingerprint \(user-agent, platform, screen,
  viewport, timezone, language, touch, timestamps\) sent to Supabase
- Add device_id + audit \(jsonb\) columns to the payload

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
